title: Blocks Of Monster Stuff
description: Adds blocks made from monster loot for storage and some functionalities related to the mobs of which it was made from.
body:
Not just another mod that adds Compacting recipes. This one makes some of the Blocks have functions related to the Monster they are made from.

|Base|Recipe|Result|Function|Note|
|-|-|-|-|-|
|![rotten flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f51587f8fa7af6b603b7dcfa745b7ee7fea6b5fd.png)|![rotten_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f516fa53851cfce711503c0e5dc1efef88d6227.png)|![rotten_block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b96344f2277f51beed99e47bb20445c3d1dbe291.png)|None|Drippy and Juicy|
|![gunpowder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f50b9b1fdd8b818fec71c1dcce2006339fd781ba.png)|![gunpower_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adf1ea374b13cd15db5947e8e956ee6be35de293.png)|![gunpowder_block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfd343e4eafaa8e37b04573e18add8c70ceff217.png)|Falls like sand, extremely unstable. **See details below for more info.**||
|![blaze_rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d898e5209d4d6aad830eaa4d7cba648e6bf48d77.png)|![blaze_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd0cc0b8382b94faaaa2bb02d8a6df6537cef8ca.png)|![blaze_block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/444e5eec61639b150931154d6c4aba4776ed1d33.png)|Hurts when you walk on like magma, Sets entities and surrounding flammable blocks on fire.|Can be use as a fuel, burns 10 times longer than what it's made from, just like when Coal is made into a Block. Has animated texture.|
|![ender_pearl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26e74383073cb9cdcb3a909f6453463747bd3f7e.png)|![ender_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15e896506849d89e9e226fa90b9a3bce2270421b.png)|![ender_block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fe7bf350e7404fdc31a3ffd1b79f6faea0e8aa6.png)|Vertical Teleporter. **See details below for more info.**|Max stack size 16 like it's base.|
|![bone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aea904429db66be2553c859bec22e6bd63d1d78.png)|![bone_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53714fc9fe27cb7410acec44b6f653508555333d.png)|![bone_block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af8a536237613fae69c288a135609e21da4b8286.png)|None|Rattles when you walk on it.|
|![spider_eye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/550511697ab9d07c0e0a733fe1c47b760e621811.png)|![spider_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34acb9dd1276bdd674e4b1518f3bb3c3511d1849.png)|![spider_block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/300eeafb97a119a6d69a3fd34584947b6dbeac79.png)|Wearable!|
|![string](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f161e7c3e942b93300690b80763e03582f651a64.png)|![string_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3195ca076abce01b15fe874509aa1f7447598c2c.png)|![string_block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b059893f46b5832d3ea26b0654e76823ae391f6b.png)|Flammable|Is a slab!|


<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

Block of Gunpowder:  
The Block of Gunpowder explodes on landing or when it comes into contact with a "hot block",
this includes lava, block of blaze, magma, campfires and fire. This pool is configurable by creating a datapack and including a "gunpowder_igniters" block tag json file. This can be done to add hot blocks from other mods. If one desires.  
  
Block of Ender:  
The Block of Ender acts as a vertical teleporter which is triggered by either jumping or sneaking on top. This will result in the entity being teleported to the next valid block above or below the Block of Ender, depending on what action they performed. Jumping of course bringing the entity up and Sneaking bringing the entity down. If no valid teleport location is found, nothing happens.
</details>


Part of a series that aims at adding more compacting recipes.
